name: TFA gets stuck in a blank, white room♡
description:
So basically, everyone in Transformers: Animated gets stuck in a white room somehow. This one is my second bot, the RPG TFA one was my first, I had accidentally put it as my second. But anyways, have fun, go at it, or something.

And btw, you can add some of the other characters yourself in this if u want. Just prob mention or use an action where you speak to a character like Soundwave, Swindle or Lockdown for example and that should add them in.
creator: MialikesTransformers10
